message:
Merge PR #2511: fix: DEFERRED exit incorrectly closing work bead

Adds exitType != ExitDeferred guard to prevent gt done from closing
a work bead during deferred exits. Deferred exits preserve the bead
so work can resume on the next session.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2511
Author: rexgnu (Gabriel Ledung)

Co-authored-by: Gabriel Ledung <rexgnu@users.noreply.github.com>
